title: Lasianthera parviflora
taxonomy: Lasianthera parviflora is a species of flowering plant in the family Staphylocarpidae, which is part of the order Santalales. This plant is native to tropical Africa and has been classified as a member of the family Staphylocarpidae due to its unique characteristics. The Staphylocarpidae family is a small group of flowering plants that are primarily found in Africa. Lasianthera parviflora is a shrub or small tree that grows in a variety of habitats. The exact classification of Lasianthera parviflora has been confirmed through extensive botanical research and analysis.
